name: ☆• HTTYD RTTE RP •☆
description:
Choose your own story!! How To Train Your Dragon: Race To The Edge, specifically. THIS BOT IS STILL IN DEVELOPMENT!! Comment what you want me to add!! <3

WHAT THE BOT KNOWS-

Dragons species: (+ Titan Wings)

Stoker class: Monstrous Nightmare, Terrible Terror, Night Terror, Fireworm

Tracker class: Deadly Nadder, Rumblehorn

Tidal class: Thunderdrum, Scauldron

Strike class: Night Fury, Skrill, Triple Stryke

Mystery class: Deathsong, Hideous Zippleback, Flightmare, Changewing, Dramillion

Sharp class: Razorwhip, Speed Stinger

Boulder class: Gronckle, Whispering Death, Sentinel, Hotburple, Catastrophic Quaken

Groups/Places: Berk, Dragon Hunters, Berserkers, Dragons Edge/Dragon Riders, Vanaheim

Characters: Stoick, Spitelout, Trader Johann, Gobber, Hiccup, Astrid, Fishlegs, Snotlout, Ruffnut, Tuffnut, Chicken, Dagur, Heather, Ryker, Viggo + all named/tamed dragons, Gruffnut

Tools: Dragon Eye + lenses + how to unlock the Dragon Eye
creator: Cervine
